operation.name: write_at_dmamove_job_submit
preconditions:
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun flags () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(declare-fun src_role () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert (and  (=  (_ bv0 32) (bvand  (concat  (select  flags (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  flags (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  flags (_ bv1 32) ) (select  flags (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) (_ bv1 32) ) ) (=  (_ bv0 32) (concat  (select  src_role (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  src_role (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  src_role (_ bv1 32) ) (select  src_role (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) ) )
(check-sat)
(exit)
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun flags () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(declare-fun src_role () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert (let ( (?B1 (concat  (select  src_role (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  src_role (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  src_role (_ bv1 32) ) (select  src_role (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) ) (and  (=  ?B1 (bvand  (concat  (select  flags (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  flags (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  flags (_ bv1 32) ) (select  flags (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) (_ bv1 32) ) ) (=  false (=  (_ bv0 32) ?B1 ) ) ) ) )
(check-sat)
(exit)

oracle_spec.assertion: dmamove_job.status stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs
assumptions: producer sets status without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant

metadata.wma: Logic-Induced Signal Divergence to Adversary-Controlled Memory Access
